div.head: The Minister in Bolivia (Des Portes) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 19. Calvo resignation accepted. Minister of Gobernación, Ugarte, President’s brother-in-law as interim Foreign Minister today replied to League Commission to the following effect:League of Nations, Official Journal, July 1934, p. 795.

list.label: (1st)
list.item: Bolivian Government accepts Hague Arbitration within maximum pretensions according to the principles of August ’32.
list.label: (2d)
list.item: Is disposed to consider and accept exclusion zone for Paraguay if compensated equivalent zone Paraguay River.
list.label: (3d)
list.item: Considers essential resolve basic question and that stipulations arbitration be concrete foreseeing. Therefore security measures not considered of great importance although they should be just. It is hoped transitory security measures will find easy solution.
list.label: (4th)
list.item: Because of the difficulties Bolivia suggests conferences Ministers both countries under the influence League Commission.
